description:
Your task is to write a Playwright test for the Course Marketplace home page in `e2e/app.spec.js`. The application is already working correctly, so you only need to focus on writing the test.

The test should:
- Navigate to the home page using `page.goto('/')` (do not hardcode URLs or ports)
- Verify that the page title is "Course Marketplace"
- Ensure any loading or error states are resolved before assertions
- Check that a level-1 heading with the text "Course Marketplace" is visible
- Verify that the tagline about browsing courses is visible on the page
expectedOutcome: When you run `npm run test:e2e`, all tests should pass. The test should rely on the provided BASE_URL configuration and should not contain any hardcoded URLs. Assertions should correctly validate the title, heading, and tagline.
hint: Use Playwright methods like `page.goto('/')`, `page.title()`, `getByRole('heading', { level: 1 })`, and `getByText()` to implement your assertions. Avoid hardcoding values like ports or full URLs.
